Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that later lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that include a subsequent Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time spent in Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION across all process variants that eventually result in a rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that avoid any rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average duration of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION compared to the duration of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in successful (non-rejected) paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER does not occur

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that do not involve PRE_APPROVER versus those that do
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to be followed by Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where PRE_APPROVER is involved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that loop back due to rejections versus linear approval paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and the next rejection activity (e.g., Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER or Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION when the case originates from a resubmission after Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION occurs

Name: Average cycle time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that include Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER versus those that skip it
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER occurs

Name: Minimum time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that proceed directly to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR without intermediate approvers
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment in successful end-to-end cases that never encounter a PRE_APPROVER rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average waiting time to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION after a resubmission following Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that later trigger Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER, grouped by case:Amount ranges
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'
